query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: Red and orange flowers with green stems positioned low in the frame against a very bright white background. The blossoms appear soft and diffused, with petals overlapping and light passing through some of the thinner petal areas.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Red and orange flowers with green stems bloom at the bottom edge of a severely overexposed white background that bleeds into the blossoms, creating an intentionally blown-out high-key effect. The flowers are rendered in soft, diffused blur with no sharp edges, petals melting into hazy shapes against the overwhelming brightness as light consumes most of the frame.
